narrative:
Marysville 13 (precinct in Union County) has 1,245 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.5 percentage points.
